title: viola × colliniformis
intro: Viola × colliniformis, also known as the hybrid pansy or Johnny-jump-up, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the viola genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Viola × colliniformis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. Viola × colliniformis can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used to treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma.
